free_text: Neutron capture and fission cross sections of
- 20 m flight path for data below 200 eV
- 85 m flight path for data above 200 eV
To discriminate between fast neutrons and gamma
PuO2 sample (7.62 cm diam) containing 2 g of 241Pu:
NE213 liquid scintillators for detection of
Parallel-plate BF3 ionization chamber for flux
The 85-m flight path data set was normalized to the
20-m flight path dat set over the neutron energy from
VM:updated to new date formats,lower case.
BP: Updated the information, linked related
publications, added average value of fission and alpha
data. Subentry 3 split into 3 (with new subents. 7,8)
Absorption was normalized using total data of Kolar
and Carraro and subtracting scattering data from
On. ANALYSIS added. STATUS: COREL -> DEP
Data points above 0.4 eV moved to new
subentries 7, 8 because of different error analysis
The definitions of G and H used are those of
deSaussure and are larger than those defined by Adler
and Adler by a constant factor of 6.52e+05 B*eV.
Data taken from Table I in Nuc.Sci.Eng. 68,
